title: Server-side Copilot Runtime service
goal: Add a separate Copilot Runtime service that connects CopilotKit UI to the AG-UI endpoint through a server-side HttpAgent.
non_goals: Do not put business logic in Copilot Runtime.
Do not give Copilot Runtime direct database access.
Do not use direct browser HttpAgent for production.
Do not add hosted CopilotKit persistence.
acceptance: Copilot Runtime has a health endpoint.
Telemetry is disabled through environment in on-prem profile.
Service-to-service auth is documented and does not expose secrets.
